name: Gobuster
author: Security Assessment Dashboard
description: Directory/file, DNS, and VHost busting tool written in Go. Detects installation and version only in this phase — no scan is executed.

install_instructions.linux: `sudo apt install gobuster` (Debian/Ubuntu/Kali), `sudo dnf install gobuster` (Fedora/RHEL), `sudo pacman -S gobuster` (Arch), or `go install github.com/OJ/gobuster/v3@latest`. See docs/LINUX_TOOL_INSTALLATION.md for details.
